reviews.comment:
El restaurante correcto, la comida buena y abundante y el hotel tranqui. Buen lugar para descanso y seguir viaje...

(Translated by Google)
The restaurant was good, the food was plentiful and delicious, and the hotel was quiet. A good place to rest before continuing your journey...

reviews.comment:
En 25 de mayo , la pampa. Lo mejor que tiene es el descenso de el valor del litro de infimia, llendo hacia el sur. Confortable como todo ACA, en ruta.

(Translated by Google)
On May 25th, in the pampas. The best thing about it is the drop in the price of a liter of gasoline, heading south. Comfortable, like all ACA vehicles, on the highway.
